607.reason: [After detecting a single '&' or '|', the lexer must consume the current character to advance the input buffer; otherwise, the same character will be reprocessed in the next getsym() call, potentially causing an infinite loop or missed error reporting. Although the main loop stops after this error in the current implementation, best practice and robustness require consuming the erroneous character.]
